title: Skyblock MasterPack - Hypixel Skyblock
description: [Skyblock MasterPack] This modpack for Hypixel Skyblock, fully preconfigured mods designed to optimize your Hypixel Skyblock experience.✨
body:
🇬🇧

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

# Skyblock MasterPack ⚡

_*Created by Gothic Lover (GT)*_

This modpack is designed for **Hypixel Skyblock 1.21.10**, intended for **Dungeon**, **Slayer**, **Fishing**, **Foraging**, **Kuudra**, **Farming and Event (Diana)** 🏹🎣🌱.
It provides an **optimized**, **smooth and fully pre-configured** experience, with mods that enhance performance, interface, and comfort without altering server mechanics.
Goal: a clean, high-performance installation fully dedicated to Skyblock.

## 🚀 Main Features

Complete and ready-to-use Skyblock experience
Stable FPS and fast loading
Interface optimized for Skyblock
Clean, minimalist, Skyblock-dedicated installation
Designed for Dungeon, Slayer, Fishing, Foraging, Farming and Event (Diana) 🏹🎣🌱

## 🧩 Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

### 🧿 Skyblock (Core)

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

1. Firmament for Hypixel SkyBlock
1. Skyblock Overhaul (SBO)
1. Aaron's Mod
1. Skyblocker
2. Skyhanni
1. SkyBlock Profile Viewer
4. Devonian
5. Odin

</details>

### ⚡ Optimization

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

1. Sodium
2. Sodium Extra
1. Lithium
1. FerriteCore
1. Entity Culling

</details>

### 🧱 API

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

1. Fabric API,
1. Architectury API,
1. Cloth Config API,
1. Forge Config API Port,
1. Fabric Language Kotlin,
1. Hypixel Mod API
1. Collective
1. Text Placeholder API
1. YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)

</details>

### 🎮 QoL (Quality of Life)

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

1. Modern Warp Menu
1. Essential Mod
1. Roughly Enough Items (REI)
1. Tooltip Scroll
1. Mod Menu
1. Dark Loading Screen
1. MinecraftCapes

</details>

### 🎨 Included Resource Packs

<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

1. Defrosted
1. Furfsky Reborn
1. Skyblock Dark Mode

</details>

</details>

🌐 **Server Compatibility**: 100% compatible with Hypixel Skyblock, **no risk of bans or conflicts.**

⚙️ **Modloader Version**: Modpack designed for **Minecraft 1.21.10 with Fabric Loader**.

💻 **Performance**: Optimized to run on computers of all configurations for a smooth and stable experience.


🔧 For more details on configuring the mod, see the gallery; the most important commands are listed there. If you have any questions, feel free to contact me directly on Discord.

**_"Install and enjoy a smooth and optimized Skyblock experience now! ⚡"_**


</details>


🇫🇷

<details>
<summary>Clic moi</summary>

# Skyblock MasterPack ⚡

_Créé par Gothic Lover (GT)_

Ce modpack est conçu pour **Hypixel Skyblock 1.21.8**, pensé pour **Dungeon**, **Slayer**, **Fishing**, **Foraging**, **Kuudra**, **Farming et Event (Diana)** 🏹🎣🌱.
Il offre une expérience **optimisée**, **fluide et entièrement préconfigurée**, avec des mods qui améliorent les performances, l’interface et le confort sans toucher aux mécaniques du serveur.
Objectif : une installation propre, performante et totalement dédiée à Skyblock.

## 🚀 Caractéristiques principales

Expérience Skyblock complète et prête à l’emploi
FPS stables et chargements rapides
Interface optimisée pour Skyblock
Installation propre, minimaliste et dédiée Skyblock
Conçu pour Dungeon, Slayer, Fishing, Foraging, Farming et Event (Diana) 🏹🎣🌱

🌐 **Compatibilité serveur** : 100% compatible avec Hypixel Skyblock, **aucun risque de ban ou de conflit.**

**"Installez et profitez d’une expérience Skyblock fluide et optimisée dès maintenant ! ⚡"**

🔧 Pour plus de détails sur la configuration du mod, consultez la galerie ; les commandes les plus importantes y sont indiquées. Si vous avez des questions, n'hésitez pas à me contacter directement sur Discord.
